title: Bitcoin’s 4-Year Cycle Says BTC Should Be at $150,000 by End of 2026
description: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) is trading around $81,000 today, down 35% from its all-time high of $126,000. The 4-year halving cycle, which traders have followed since 2012, points to a peak roughly 12 to 18 months after every halving. Bitcoin hit its $126K high in October 2025—right inside that window—but bulls argue the cycle has another ... Bitcoin’s 4-Year Cycle Says BTC Should Be at $150,000 by End of 2026
